title: Add YSOAI IMAGE GENERATOR to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: YSOAI joins the garden
gist.blurb: The YSOAI Image Generator has officially sprouted in our community greenhouse. Generate images quickly and for free using this sweet new integration!
gist.summary: Added the YSOAI Image Generator to the Pollinations community app showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use the YSOAI Image Generator directly from the Pollinations app directory.
gist.visual_concept: A greenhouse setting representing the community apps directory. Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot looking at a newly generated picture/canvas, symbolizing the new YSOAI image generator.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, flying inside a lush digital greenhouse with code-plants. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head holds up a glowing picture frame showing a beautiful generated landscape. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, flying inside a lush digital greenhouse with code-plants. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head holds up a glowing picture frame showing a beautiful generated landscape. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
